title: Saturated Saddles + Fresh Animations
description: Adds compatibility between Saturated Saddles and Fresh Animations
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/347d1ce0970ad618d757a21b56b9b000efdcbd7d.png)
# Saturated Saddles + Fresh Animations  
  Adds compatibility between Saturated Saddles and Fresh Animations. This pack contains everything Saturated Saddles needs to work, so you don't need to install the main resource pack if you use this one.
## Dependencies
- [**Saturated Saddles**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/saturated-saddles) (required)
- [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (required)
## Credits
[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
